improvements.proposal: Require implementor to verify module is invoked from a deployable entrypoint template (for example infra/main.bicep) when acceptance criteria depend on deployed effects.
improvements.reason: Code review identified that creating a module file alone is insufficient if nothing deploys it.

improvements.proposal: Explicitly require `git status --short` check before review to ensure changed IaC files are tracked and committed.
improvements.reason: Review flagged untracked RBAC artifacts as a critical blocker.

improvements.proposal: Ask implementor to document/validate whether resource IDs may cross resource groups or subscriptions and choose scoping logic accordingly.
improvements.reason: Review suggested fragility when deriving existing-resource references from IDs without explicit cross-scope handling.
